fix: useEffect 의존성 race condition으로 블록 매칭 안되는 버그 수정

processChainReaction이 useCallback으로 감싸져 있어 의존성이
바뀔 때마다 새 참조가 생성됨. 이 참조가 useEffect deps에 있어서
effect가 재실행되면서 cleanup이 setTimeout을 취소하여 융합 체크가
실행되지 않는 근본 원인 수정.

- processChainReaction/spawnBlock을 useRef에 저장
- useEffect deps에서 제거하여 불필요한 재실행 방지
- 안전장치 체크 주기 500ms → 200ms로 단축

commit.message:
route notifyAndy() through cf-internal private worker

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add agent lifecycle endpoints (#11) (#25)

* Add agent lifecycle endpoints (#11)

Implement three agent endpoints: POST /agents/register (unauthenticated
bootstrap), PUT /agents/{agent_id}/heartbeat (authenticated, self-only),
and GET /agents/{agent_id} (authenticated, any agent can view).

Key behaviors:
- Registration is idempotent (same key = 200, different key = 409)
- First heartbeat transitions agent from registered to active
- Heartbeat enforces agent_id match (cannot heartbeat for another agent)
- All responses include HATEOAS _links and Pattern 13 onboarding steps

Also implements DatabaseAgentLookup to replace PlaceholderAgentLookup,
wired into app.py via dependency override. Fixes validation error
handler to sanitize non-serializable pydantic ctx objects.

37 new tests (174 total), ruff clean, mypy clean.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Fix PR #25 review: POST heartbeat, AGENT_EXISTS code, cleanup

- BLOCKER: Change heartbeat from PUT to POST per RFC §4.3
- Minor: Add AGENT_EXISTS error code, replace WORKFLOW_EXISTS for agent conflicts
- Minor: Move base64 import to module level in schemas.py
- Minor: Extract test helpers to conftest.py, remove duplication
- Debt: Remove dead _links field from Pydantic response models

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Fix PR #25 round 2: remove unreachable auth None guards

commit.message:
Fix mosque search input deleting characters by moving to client-side filtering

Text search was triggering server navigations via router.replace on every
keystroke, which suspended useSearchParams inside a Suspense boundary,
unmounting the input and losing typed characters. Search filtering now
happens entirely client-side with useMemo — no URL navigation on typing.
State filter remains URL-based (button clicks only).

commit.message:
fix: install.sh CLAUDE.md section replacement was silently failing

The awk-based replacement for the takt section in ~/.claude/CLAUDE.md
could not handle multi-line strings, causing it to silently fail. The
old section was never replaced, so users kept getting stale routing
(takt solo/team instead of start takt). Replaced with sed delete +
append, matching the approach already used for untagged migration.

commit.message:
Fix: remove jsonBody (double-encoding) + complete create→send workflow

ROOT CAUSE: JSON.stringify() in jsonBody double-encodes the body.
The webhook receives a string instead of an object → Parser fails
→ Postgres fails → webhook returns HTML error.

FIX: Removed jsonBody from ALL 19 tools. Now specifyBody:"json"
without jsonBody lets the AI agent provide the body directly
(same pattern as CYRIL workflow that worked).

Each toolDescription now contains the exact JSON body format
with tenantId hardcoded in the example.

PROMPT: Updated to chain create → send via Gmail (4 steps):
1. rechercher_clients → get clientFinalId
2. lister_articles → get article info
3. creer_devis → create in DB
4. Send a message in Gmail → email the client

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(x402s): closed channel detection, reduce log scan, RPC fix

- Client ensure(): detect closed channels (status/onChainTotalBalance=0)
  and clear cache instead of trying to deposit into closed channel
- Client ensure(): use let instead of const for ch to avoid infinite
  recursion when clearing closed channel cache
- Client hyd(): reduce on-chain log scan from 100k to 5k blocks to
  prevent slow discover on Sepolia public RPCs
- Server: switch RPC from dead publicnode.com to sepolia.drpc.org
- Server: pm2 process recreated to pick up new .env (id 37→38)

commit.message:
fix: rewrite compressTrace to interleave all entries chronologically

Previous implementation only sent the last 3 TXT entries to the evaluator
model, causing massive context loss (e.g., 49 TXT entries → only 3 sent).
The evaluator saw many tool calls but minimal text output, incorrectly
judging most traces as "truncated".

New approach:
- All entries (tool calls + text) ordered chronologically by line_number
- Intermediate text entries truncated to 200 chars for context
- Last 3 text entries kept full (up to 5000 chars) for summary evaluation
- Gives the evaluator complete execution flow visibility

7-platform hot trending data. Update Platform enum to match backend

xiaohongshu/x/bilibili. Add supabase-swift 2.x SPM dependency, rewrite

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix buildings being queued on empty planets

Add num_pops > 0 guard to all emergency and proactive automation blocks
so buildings/districts are never queued on planets with zero pops. The
previous logic allowed vacuous-truth matches (no unemployed pops because
there are no pops at all) to trigger construction.

Also remove the early game bypass that let foundries and factories build
on capital planets regardless of alloy/CG income — they now require an
actual deficit to trigger.
